info.title: Pulih API
info.summary: Recovery support, psychologist booking, payments, content, achievements, and safe AI coach API.
info.description: Complete OpenAPI reference for Pulih MVP. Includes module-level docs, request payload schemas, response envelopes, examples for success and common error status codes, auth requirements, route inventory parity, and mental-health safety notes.

tags.name: platform
tags.description: Health probes, validation demo, OpenAPI artifacts, and Scalar docs.

tags.name: auth
tags.description: Email/password registration, login, logout, current principal, and onboarding.

tags.name: users
tags.description: Current user profile and recovery settings.

tags.name: psychologists
tags.description: Psychologist onboarding, credentials, review submission, bundles, public directory, and sessions.

tags.name: bookings
tags.description: Patient booking lifecycle, payment hold, confirmation, channel access, and reschedule.

tags.name: payments
tags.description: Pakasir webhook processing and payment status transitions.

tags.name: routine
tags.description: Daily check-ins, relapse tracking, streaks, and recovery statistics.

tags.name: community
tags.description: Authenticated community posts, comments, and likes.

tags.name: achievements
tags.description: Achievement catalog, progress, and unlocked achievements.

tags.name: ai
tags.description: Non-streaming safe AI coach, relapse help, summaries, and persona preferences.

get.description:
Returns process liveness for uptime checks. Does not verify DB connectivity.

Common contract: all JSON responses use Pulih envelope. Protected routes require Bearer JWT. Validation failures return 422 with field-level details. Error messages stay safe and English.

Creates a patient account with email, username and password. Returns user profile and access token. Duplicate email or username returns 409.

password: Password must be at least 8 characters.
